sub_modules.aes128_key_expand: Combinational AES-128 forward key expansion producing all eleven 128-bit round keys for reverse-order decryption use.
sub_modules.aes128_decrypt_core: Combinational AES-128 decrypt datapath wiring initial AddRoundKey, nine inverse rounds, and final inverse round.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_round: Combinational inverse AES round implementing InvShiftRows, InvSubBytes, AddRoundKey, and optional InvMixColumns bypass for the final round.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_shiftrows: Combinational AES inverse row rotation over the 128-bit state.
sub_modules.aes128_inv_mixcolumns: Combinational AES inverse column mixing over GF(2^8).
sub_modules.aes128_inv_subbytes: Combinational byte-wise AES inverse S-box substitution.
